ucs.title: [LLM] Silent Librarian (TA407 / COBALT DICKENS) university library-portal phishing → credential reuse from clicker IP
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical TA407 / COBALT DICKENS chain: a spearphish bearing a URL to a Silent-Librarian-registered lookalike of a library / EZproxy / SSO portal (T1583.001 + T1598.003 + T1608.005) is clicked by a user, followed within ~60 min by a successful Entra ID sign-in for that same user from the same source IP. This is exactly how the Mabna Institute crew has compromised hundreds of universities since 2013 — they harvest faculty creds via library-themed lures and immediately reuse them against the real tenant.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS click_time values(Email.src_user) AS sender values(Email.subject) AS subject values(Email.url) AS phish_url FROM datamodel=Email WHERE Email.direction=inbound Email.action IN ("delivered","delivered_as_spam") (Email.url="*ezproxy*" OR Email.url="*libauth*" OR Email.url="*library*" OR Email.url="*ovid*" OR Email.url="*proquest*" OR Email.url="*ebsco*" OR Email.url="*sciencedirect*" OR Email.url="*scholar*" OR Email.url="*sso-login*" OR Email.url="*webvpn*") BY Email.recipient Email.message_id
| rename Email.recipient AS user Email.message_id AS message_id
| join type=inner user [
    | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS auth_time values(Authentication.src) AS auth_src values(Authentication.app) AS app FROM datamodel=Authentication WHERE Authentication.action=success (Authentication.app="AzureActiveDirectory" OR Authentication.app="office365" OR Authentication.app="o365") BY Authentication.user
    | rename Authentication.user AS user
]
| eval delay_min=round((auth_time-click_time)/60,1)
| where delay_min>=0 AND delay_min<=60
| iplocation auth_src
| search Country!="United States" Country!="United Kingdom" Country!="Canada" Country!="Australia" Country!=""
| table click_time auth_time delay_min user sender subject phish_url auth_src Country City app
| sort 0 - auth_time
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowMin = 60;
// Silent Librarian's lure inventory — academic / library / SSO portal lookalikes
let LibKeywords = dynamic(["ezproxy","libauth","library","libraries","login","sso","webvpn","ovid","scholar","wiley","sciencedirect","jstor","proquest","ebsco","shibboleth","webauth"]);
let TrustedDomains = dynamic(["ezproxy.yourorg.edu","library.yourorg.edu","login.microsoftonline.com","sts.yourorg.edu"]);
let SuspectClicks =
    EmailEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EmailDirection == "Inbound"
    | where DeliveryAction in ("Delivered","DeliveredAsSpam")
    | join kind=inner (
        EmailUrlInfo
        | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
        | where UrlDomain has_any (LibKeywords)
        | where UrlDomain !in~ (TrustedDomains)
        | project NetworkMessageId, Url, UrlDomain
      ) on NetworkMessageId
    | join kind=inner (
        UrlClickEvents
        | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
        | where ActionType in ("ClickAllowed","ClickedThrough")
        | project NetworkMessageId, ClickTime = Timestamp, AccountUpn, ClickIP = IPAddress
      ) on NetworkMessageId
    | project NetworkMessageId, ClickTime, AccountUpn, ClickIP,
              Url, UrlDomain, SenderFromAddress, Subject;
AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ErrorCode == 0                              // successful auth only
| where ClientAppUsed in ("Browser","Mobile Apps and Desktop clients","Other clients")
| join kind=inner SuspectClicks on $left.AccountUpn == $right.AccountUpn
| where Timestamp between (ClickTime .. ClickTime + WindowMin * 1m)
| where IPAddress == ClickIP                        // same egress IP — clicker == authenticator
   or Country !in ("United States","United Kingdom","Canada","Australia")
   or IsAnonymousProxy == true
| extend DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, ClickTime)
| project ClickTime, AuthTime = Timestamp, DelayMin,
          AccountUpn, ClickIP, AuthIP = IPAddress, Country, City,
          UrlDomain, Url, SenderFromAddress, Subject,
          Application, ConditionalAccessStatus, RiskLevelDuringSignIn
| order by AuthTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowMin = 60;
let LibKeywords = dynamic(["ezproxy","libauth","library","libraries","webvpn","ovid","scholar","wiley","sciencedirect","jstor","proquest","ebsco","shibboleth","webauth"]);
// Sentinel lacks UrlClickEvents — substitute the email-side signal: inbound mail
// referencing a Silent-Librarian-style library lookalike that lands in mailbox.
let SuspectMail =
    OfficeActivity
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
    | where Operation in~ ("Deliver","MailItemsAccessed")
    | extend RecipientUpn = tolower(MailboxOwnerUPN)
    | where Subject has_any (LibKeywords)
        or tostring(Parameters) has_any (LibKeywords)
    | project MailTime = TimeGenerated, RecipientUpn, Subject, Sender;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ResultType == 0                       // successful sign-in
| extend Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion)
| extend UpnLower = tolower(UserPrincipalName)
| join kind=inner SuspectMail on $left.UpnLower == $right.RecipientUpn
| where TimeGenerated between (MailTime .. MailTime + WindowMin * 1m)
| where Country !in ("United States","United Kingdom","Canada","Australia","")
   or ClientAppUsed == "Other clients"        // legacy auth — TA407 favourite for spray
   or RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("medium","high")
| extend DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, MailTime)
| project MailTime, AuthTime = TimeGenerated, DelayMin,
          UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Country,
          AppDisplayName, ClientAppUsed,
          ConditionalAccessStatus, RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
          Sender, Subject
| order by AuthTime desc
ucs.rationale: Generic phishing-to-auth correlations fire on commodity credential phish constantly. THIS query is keyed to Silent Librarian's signature lure inventory — EZproxy / Shibboleth / Ovid / ProQuest / EBSCO / SSO library portals — which is the trademark of the Mabna Institute group documented in the 2018 DOJ indictment and the Phish Labs / Malwarebytes Silent Librarian writeups. Pairing the same-IP-as-c

ucs.title: [LLM] Silent Librarian post-compromise mailbox auto-forward (T1114.003) on academic accounts
ucs.description: Hunts Silent Librarian's exfil step: after harvesting a faculty / researcher credential, the operator logs in and creates an Outlook inbox rule that auto-forwards mail to an external address (or moves library / journal-access mail to a hidden folder). Pairs the rule-creation event with a sign-in from a low-reputation / non-Five-Eyes IP earlier in the same session — the combination separates TA407 from a benign user setting up a vacation forward.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS rule_time values(All_Changes.command) AS rule_params values(All_Changes.src) AS rule_src FROM datamodel=Change WHERE All_Changes.action=created All_Changes.object_category=email_rule (All_Changes.command="*ForwardTo*" OR All_Changes.command="*RedirectTo*" OR All_Changes.command="*DeleteMessage*" OR All_Changes.command="*MoveToFolder*RSS*" OR All_Changes.command="*MoveToFolder*Archive*") BY All_Changes.user
| rename All_Changes.user AS user
| join type=inner user [
    | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) AS auth_time values(Authentication.src) AS auth_src FROM datamodel=Authentication WHERE Authentication.action=success Authentication.app="AzureActiveDirectory" BY Authentication.user
    | rename Authentication.user AS user
    | iplocation auth_src
    | search Country!="United States" Country!="United Kingdom" Country!="Canada" Country!="Australia"
]
| eval session_age_min=round((rule_time-auth_time)/60,1)
| where session_age_min>=0 AND session_age_min<=240
| table auth_time rule_time session_age_min user auth_src Country City rule_src rule_params
| sort 0 - rule_time
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let SessionWindow = 4h;
// 1. Risky / foreign-origin successful sign-ins (Silent Librarian operator session)
let OperatorSessions =
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | where Country !in ("United States","United Kingdom","Canada","Australia","")
        or IsAnonymousProxy == true
        or ClientAppUsed == "Other clients"
        or RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("medium","high")
    | project AuthTime = Timestamp, AccountUpn, AuthIP = IPAddress,
              Country, City, Application, ClientAppUsed, RiskLevelDuringSignIn;
// 2. Inbox-rule create / set within 4 h of that sign-in
CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ActionType in~ ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","Update inbox rules")
| extend Raw = tostring(RawEventData)
| where Raw has_any ("ForwardTo","RedirectTo","ForwardAsAttachmentTo",
                     "DeleteMessage","MoveToFolder")
| extend RuleAccountUpn = tolower(AccountDisplayName)
| join kind=inner (OperatorSessions | extend RuleAccountUpn = tolower(AccountUpn))
      on RuleAccountUpn
| where Timestamp between (AuthTime .. AuthTime + SessionWindow)
| extend SessionAgeMin = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, AuthTime)
| project AuthTime, RuleTime = Timestamp, SessionAgeMin,
          AccountUpn, AuthIP, Country, City,
          ActionType, RuleParams = Raw,
          Application, ClientAppUsed, RiskLevelDuringSignIn
| order by RuleTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let SessionWindow = 4h;
let OperatorSessions =
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion)
    | where Country !in ("United States","United Kingdom","Canada","Australia","")
        or ClientAppUsed == "Other clients"
        or RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("medium","high")
    | project AuthTime = TimeGenerated, UpnLower = tolower(UserPrincipalName),
              AuthIP = IPAddress, Country, AppDisplayName, ClientAppUsed, RiskLevelDuringSignIn;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where Operation in~ ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules")
| where ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded" or ResultStatus =~ "True"
| extend ParamStr = tostring(Parameters)
| where ParamStr has_any ("ForwardTo","RedirectTo","ForwardAsAttachmentTo",
                          "DeleteMessage","MoveToFolder")
| extend UpnLower = tolower(UserId)
| join kind=inner OperatorSessions on UpnLower
| where TimeGenerated between (AuthTime .. AuthTime + SessionWindow)
| extend SessionAgeMin = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, AuthTime)
| project AuthTime, RuleTime = TimeGenerated, SessionAgeMin,
          UserId, AuthIP, Country, ClientIP,
          Operation, ParamStr,
          AppDisplayName, ClientAppUsed, RiskLevelDuringSignIn
| order by RuleTime desc
ucs.rationale: Inbox-rule auto-forwarding alerts in isolation (T1114.003) are high-FP — users do legitimately set vacation forwarders. The fidelity here comes from gating on an Iran-aligned operator session: successful AAD logon from a non-Five-Eyes country / anonymising proxy / legacy-auth client within 4 hours before the rule. That session profile is exactly Silent Librarian / TA407 — the DOJ indictment and Mi
